crash.message:
AssertionError: INSERT query built with an f-string — vulnerable to injection.
  Use parameterised placeholders: INSERT INTO users VALUES (?, ?, ?)
assert <re.Match object; span=(1220, 1251), match='f"Failed to insert user: {exc}"'> is None

call.longrepr:
E   AssertionError: INSERT query built with an f-string — vulnerable to injection.
      Use parameterised placeholders: INSERT INTO users VALUES (?, ?, ?)
    assert <re.Match object; span=(1220, 1251), match='f"Failed to insert user: {exc}"'> is None

crash.message:
AssertionError: No password hashing found before the INSERT.
  Hash the password with bcrypt before storing it:
    hashed = bcrypt.hashpw(password.encode(), bcrypt.gensalt())
assert False
 +  where False = any(<generator object test_password_is_hashed_before_insert.<locals>.<genexpr> at 0x104356cf0>)

call.longrepr:
E   AssertionError: No password hashing found before the INSERT.
      Hash the password with bcrypt before storing it:
        hashed = bcrypt.hashpw(password.encode(), bcrypt.gensalt())
    assert False
     +  where False = any(<generator object test_password_is_hashed_before_insert.<locals>.<genexpr> at 0x104356cf0>)

vuln_issues.text: Possible SQL injection vector through string-based query construction.

vuln_issues.message: insert_user passes user_data directly to the query without an allowlist — vulnerable to mass assignment.

cwe: CWE-915: Improperly Controlled Modification of Dynamically-Determined Object Attributes

vuln_issues.message: insert_user stores password without hashing — plaintext password written to database.

cwe: CWE-312: Cleartext Storage of Sensitive Information

AssertionError: No field allowlist found.
  Define an explicit set of insertable fields, e.g.:

  and ignore any key in user_data not in that set.
assert False
